title: System and method of dynamically managed transport for mobile networks
abstract: A first controller function, e.g., a transport path manager (TPM), of a first customer network, e.g., a mobile network, may dynamically determine whether to configure a transport path in a transport network for transmitting traffic of a QoS class from the first customer network to a second customer network through the transport network based on traffic demand estimates and transport path performance data fed back from the transport network, and request the transport network to configure the transport path based on a traffic matrix of the first customer network, provider edge routers of the transport network determined by the TPM, the QoS class and a set of transport path configuration constraints.
